pageSubtitle: In-depth analysis of your financial situation
noData: Not enough data for the selected period

healthScore.title: Financial Health Score
healthScore.tooltipBody: The score is calculated from 3 components: savings ratio (income vs. expenses), tithe balance status, and monthly expense trend. Range: 0–100.

insights.title: Smart Insights
insights.noInsights: Not enough data to generate insights
insights.expensesUp: Expenses increased by {{value}}% compared to the previous period
insights.expensesDown: Expenses decreased by {{value}}% compared to the previous period
insights.incomeUp: Income increased by {{value}}% compared to the previous period
insights.incomeDown: Income decreased by {{value}}% compared to the previous period
insights.titheBalancePositive: You have a tithe debt of {{amount}}
insights.titheBalancePaid: All tithes paid – zero or positive balance
insights.expensesDriverTooltip: Comparing total expenses in the current period vs. the previous equivalent period
insights.incomeDriverTooltip: Comparing total income in the current period vs. the previous equivalent period
insights.donationDriverTooltip: Calculated as: Total Donations / Total Income × 100
insights.titheDriverTooltip: Total tithe balance – amount still owed

categories.expensesTooltip: Breakdown of total expenses in the period by category
categories.incomesTooltip: Breakdown of total income in the period by category
categories.paymentMethodTooltip: Breakdown of expenses in the period by payment method

cashFlow.title: Monthly Cash Flow
cashFlow.subtitle: Income vs. Expenses + Savings/Deficit
cashFlow.tooltipBody: Cash flow = Income – Expenses for each month. Positive = savings, negative = deficit.
